nodes.name: Get a document in Google Docs

value.Address: ={{ $('Loan Application Webhook').item.json.body.streetAddress }} {{ $('Loan Application Webhook').item.json.body.city }}, {{ $('Loan Application Webhook').item.json.body.state }} {{ $('Loan Application Webhook').item.json.body.zipCode }}

options.systemMessage:
You are a loan pre-approval assistant for a loan company.

Your job:
1) Must use the document tool every time to read the loan rules.
2) Review the loan application details you receive.
3) Output a decision: "Approved" or "Denied".
4) If Approved: output a list of requested documents (name + short description).
5) If Denied: output a clear denial_reason.

NOTE: don't deny loan because of missing documents: those will be provided later if loan meets initial criteria.

parameters.subject: Cannot Reach Customer via Email
parameters.message:
=Dear Fox Finance Team,

This email is to notify you that a client's loan has been rejected due to insufficient information.

Please look up client {{ $('Search records').item.json['First Name'] }} {{ $('Search records').item.json['Last Name'] }}and call them at number {{ $('Loan Application Webhook').item.json.body.phone }} to follow up on loan application.

Sincerly,
Fox Finance Team

parameters.subject: Please Submit Documents for Loan
parameters.message:
=Hi {{ $('Loan Application Webhook').item.json.body.firstName }} {{ $('Loan Application Webhook').item.json.body.lastName }},

Please submit the following documents to get your loan process started:

{{ $('GenerateLink').item.json.url }}

Once we receive these, we can continue processing your loan promptly.

Thank you,
Fox Finance Team

parameters.subject: New Loan Created
Loan Declined
parameters.message:
=Dear {{ $('Loan Application Webhook').item.json.body.firstName }} {{ $('Loan Application Webhook').item.json.body.lastName }},

Thank you for applying with Fox Finance. After reviewing your application, we’re unable to approve your loan at this time.

The reason for denial is the following:
{{ $json.fields['Denial Reason'] }}

You’re welcome to reapply in the future if your financial situation changes. For questions, please contact our support team.

Sincerely,
Fox Finance Customer Support Team

parameters.content:
## Main Loan Flow
Creating a new loan application. Doing preliminary analysis with AI based on requirements. Generating upload_link. Updating the database

## Show details button

This flow handles "Show Details" button in the admin's dashboard.
